etymology.description: 全(全) (quán, "whole; complete; total") + 素(素) (sù, "vegetarian; plain; simple") refers to a dietary lifestyle that is fully vegetarian without animal products.
etymology.interpretation: 全(全) (quán, "whole; complete; total") indicates entirety or completeness. 素(素) (sù, "vegetarian; plain; simple") refers to a diet or lifestyle that is free from meat, typically incorporating no animal products. Together, 全素 (quánsù) refers to a diet that is entirely vegetarian, emphasizing the absence of any animal-derived ingredients, hence 'vegan'.

examples.chinese: 我今天决定吃全素(我今天決定吃全素)。
examples.english: I've decided to eat vegan today.

examples.chinese: 全素饮食有益于健康(全素飲食有益於健康)。
examples.english: A vegan diet is beneficial for health.

examples.chinese: 在派对上(在派對上)，提供了各种全素食品(提供了各種全素食品)。
examples.pinyin: Zài pàiduì shàng, tígōngle gèzhǒng quánsù shípǐn.
examples.english: Various vegan foods were provided at the party.
